alertTemplate: [刷单预警2]${FlinkEventDTO.eventAttrMap.bankName}(${FlinkEventDTO.eventAttrMap.bankNo}): 花积分用户(${FlinkEventDTO.targetValue})，最近${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowValue}${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowUnit}内下单金额为${ProcessorDTO.eventValueGroup.orderAmount}，超过${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.threshold}元；或最近${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.windowValue}${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.windowUnit}内下单数量为${ProcessorDTO.eventValueGroup.orderCount}，超过${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.threshold}次；触发预警的商品为：${FlinkEventDTO.eventAttrMap.productName}(${FlinkEventDTO.eventAttrMap.productId})。请您及时查看原因！
